fields.name: creator
fields.label: Creator (author / director)
fields.description: For music reviews, leave blank and use Artist field.

fields.name: summary
fields.label: Summary
fields.description: One or two sentences shown in the score block.

fields.name: blurb
fields.label: Blurb
fields.description: Card-level description shown in archive and related grids.

fields.name: score_bars
fields.label: Score Bars
fields.description: Non-music: 4 bars (Prose/Worldbuilding/Pacing/Atmosphere or equivalent). Music: 5 fixed bars (Signal / Architecture / Current / Atmosphere / Signal-to-Noise). Values 0–100.

fields.name: genre_tags
fields.label: Genre Tags (music only)
fields.description: Shown in the byline for music reviews.

fields.name: featured
fields.label: Featured
fields.description: If checked, populates the homepage hero panel.

fields.name: cover_image
fields.label: Cover Image
fields.description: Used in the hero image panel when featured.

fields.name: tags
fields.label: Tags
fields.description: Thematic tags for matching with featured reviews. Use the same vocabulary as review tags.

fields.name: about_blurb
fields.label: About Blurb
fields.description: Short identity blurb for the homepage About panel.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
